race.comment: TRULY LOYAL (5) bolted in at the trials recent and he looks a very exciting colt on debut. The wide draw may be the query, but Pike remains in the saddle following his recent trial. Looks a very nice colt on debut and he can make an immediate impact. JOLSON AL (3) couldn't hold on when beaten 0.6L when leading the field up on debut at Belmont. The form out of that race was solid and Parnham remains in the saddle. Needs some luck from out wide but showed enough on debut to think he won't be a maiden for long. PERFECTLY PROPER (8) was strong fresh at Bunbury when bumping into a smart one before tackling the Magic Millions 3YO. Her recent trial was very good and the claim of Nottle means she carries no weight. Watch for her flying late in the race. GUARANTOR (2) can make an impression on the back of a nice trial. FOREVER ELITE (10) can feature off a long break.
